items.text: Notice: South Lot B will close for repaving on October 14 and 15. Vehicles must be removed by 6:00 a.m. on October 14. Permit holders may park in North Lot C at no extra charge during the closure. A $25 fine applies to any vehicle left in South Lot B.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what is the penalty for leaving a vehicle in South Lot B during the closure?

options.A: A warning letter sent by mail
options.C: A loss of the parking permit

questions.explanation: The notice states that a $25 fine applies to any vehicle left in South Lot B during the closure.

questions.stem: According to the notice, where may permit holders park during the closure?

options.A: In North Lot C at no extra charge
options.B: In the visitor lot near the library
options.C: In South Lot B before 6:00 a.m.
options.D: In any city street within two blocks

questions.explanation: The notice states permit holders may park in North Lot C at no extra charge during the closure.

items.text:
Hi Maria,

This is a quick note to confirm your resume review appointment with Career Services on Thursday, October 12, at 2:00 p.m. in Room 204 of Anderson Hall. Please bring a printed copy of your resume.

Thanks,
Ms. Chen

questions.stem: According to the email, where will the appointment take place?

options.A: Anywhere in the Career Services lobby
options.B: At the Anderson Hall information desk
options.C: Inside the Anderson Hall career office
options.D: In Room 204 of Anderson Hall building

questions.explanation: The email states the appointment is in Room 204 of Anderson Hall.

questions.stem: According to the email, what should Maria bring to the appointment?

options.A: A printed copy of her resume
options.B: A list of three possible employers
options.C: A signed confidentiality form for review

questions.explanation: The email asks Maria to bring a printed copy of her resume.

items.text: Tried the new chai latte at Quad Café this morning! Smooth, gently spiced, and only $4.50 — way better than the chain place across the street. The new seasonal menu is up through November, so go grab one before the line gets crazy!

questions.stem: According to the post, how much does the new chai latte cost?
questions.explanation: The post states the new chai latte costs $4.50.

questions.stem: According to the post, when does the seasonal menu end?

options.B: On the first day of October
options.D: On the last day of December

questions.explanation: The post says the seasonal menu is up through November.

items.text:
DRAMA CLUB PRESENTS: 'WINTERLIGHT'
November 17-19, 7:30 p.m.
Waldman Auditorium
Tickets: $5 at the door or online
Student ID required for discount
Refreshments served after Saturday's show

questions.stem: According to the flyer, when do the performances begin?

options.A: At six thirty in the evening
options.B: At seven o'clock in the evening
options.C: At seven thirty in the evening
options.D: At eight o'clock in the evening

questions.explanation: The flyer states performances are at 7:30 p.m.

questions.stem: What can be inferred from the flyer about non-students?

options.A: They are not permitted to enter the auditorium during the show
options.B: They may need to pay more than the discounted ticket price
options.C: They must reserve tickets a week in advance of opening night
options.D: They will receive priority seating in the front row sections

questions.explanation: Since a student ID is required for the discount, non-students do not qualify for the discounted price.
